# UC-14.10.2 · Aranet Temperature Excursion Outside HVAC Setpoint Band

## Description

Drift from setpoint wastes energy or risks asset cooling; Aranet temperature telemetry validates BMS performance room by room.

## Value

Reduces energy spend and prevents thermal excursions in IDF closets.

## Implementation

(1) Optional join setpoint from BMS lookup. (2) Tune band (°C). (3) Alert on sustained excursion. (4) Handoff to controls vendor.

## SPL

```spl
index=environment sourcetype="aranet:sensor" earliest=-24h
| eval temp=tonumber(coalesce(temp_c, temperature_c, ""))
| eval setpoint=tonumber(coalesce(hvac_setpoint_c, "22"))
| eval delta=abs(temp-setpoint)
| where delta>2
| timechart span=30m perc95(delta) by location
```

## Visualization

Timechart delta; table worst rooms.

## References

- [Aranet — environmental monitoring](https://aranet.com/)
- [ASHRAE — IAQ](https://www.ashrae.org/)
- [OSHA indoor air](https://www.osha.gov/indoor-air-quality)
